== Notes for [[Item:Q3357|Q3357]] ==

Mayor scribe of the government of Yucatan in 1581, Secretary of the Government of Yucatán, Alferez Mayor and Maestre de Campo of the entire province of Yucatan in 1596. Defended La Habana from the English attacks.

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-365542/search/0/Polanco

http://www.revistarelaciones.com/index.php/relaciones/rt/printerFriendly/REHS15308/636

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAA9F4B1EFBBFA9822EF79916C718F
geni:6000000076407388822


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
